metrics.label: Words Transcribed
metrics.definition: Total words transcribed from recorded or imported meeting audio.
metrics.notes: Requires canonical transcription completion event with word_count.

metrics.label: Minutes Recorded
metrics.definition: Total minutes of recorded meeting audio.
metrics.notes: Requires recording completion event with duration_minutes.

metrics.label: Meetings Recorded
metrics.definition: Count of meetings successfully recorded or processed.
metrics.notes: Team/user breakouts depend on consistent actor attribution.

metrics.label: Queries Answered
metrics.definition: Count of user queries that received successful assistant response.
metrics.notes: Needs canonical event contract for submit + answer success.

metrics.label: Workflows Run
metrics.definition: Count of completed workflow runs.
metrics.notes: Primary reliable counter for V1 launch.

metrics.label: HubSpot Workflows Run
metrics.definition: Count of completed workflow runs where HubSpot agent/tool was used.
metrics.notes: Needs direct linkage between run and hubspot tool usage.

metrics.label: HubSpot Properties Updated
metrics.definition: Count of successful HubSpot property update operations.
metrics.notes: Event proposed in instrumentation plan but not confirmed live.

metrics.label: Slack Actions
metrics.definition: Count of successful Slack outputs triggered by AskElephant automation.
metrics.notes: Requires canonical event mapping for Slack send/post/update operations.

metrics.label: HubSpot Deals Created
metrics.definition: Count of deals created in HubSpot via AskElephant workflow or agent actions.
metrics.notes: Requires canonical mapping for workflow-created and agent-created deal records.

metrics.label: HubSpot Deal Properties Filled
metrics.definition: Count of deal property fields populated or updated by AskElephant.
metrics.notes: Requires granular deal-property update event model.

metrics.label: HubSpot Companies Created
metrics.definition: Count of companies created in HubSpot through AskElephant automation.
metrics.notes: Needs event mapping parity with deal creation metrics.

metrics.label: HubSpot Company Properties Filled
metrics.definition: Count of company property fields populated or updated by AskElephant.
metrics.notes: Requires granular company-property update event model.

metrics.label: HubSpot Contacts Created
metrics.definition: Count of contacts created in HubSpot by AskElephant workflows or agents.
metrics.notes: Needs canonical contact-create event mapping.

metrics.label: HubSpot Contact Properties Filled
metrics.definition: Count of contact property fields populated or updated by AskElephant.
metrics.notes: Requires granular contact-property update event model.

metrics.label: Slack Messages Read
metrics.definition: Count of Slack messages parsed or processed by AskElephant workflows and agents.
metrics.notes: Requires exact semantics for 'read' versus 'fetched'.

metrics.label: Slack Messages Sent
metrics.definition: Count of Slack messages sent by AskElephant actions.
metrics.notes: Requires canonical Slack send event.

metrics.label: Slack Messages Updated
metrics.definition: Count of Slack messages updated or edited by AskElephant actions.
metrics.notes: Needs explicit update/edit event emission.

metrics.label: Emails Read
metrics.definition: Count of emails read or processed by AskElephant email workflows.
metrics.notes: Requires canonical event mapping for Gmail read/fetch actions.

metrics.label: Emails Sent
metrics.definition: Count of emails sent by AskElephant-assisted workflows.
metrics.notes: Needs confirmation of send event consistency across flows.

metrics.label: Emails Analyzed
metrics.definition: Count of emails analyzed for sentiment, intent, risk, or action extraction.
metrics.notes: Requires analysis-complete event with classification metadata.

metrics.label: Meetings Attended
metrics.definition: Count of meetings attended by users where AskElephant captured or processed context.
metrics.notes: Requires attendee identity normalization for team and user scope.

metrics.label: Hours of Video Recorded
metrics.definition: Total hours of recorded meeting video associated with AskElephant capture.
metrics.notes: Requires recording completion events with duration in seconds.

metrics.label: Summaries Generated
metrics.definition: Count of AI summaries generated from meetings, conversations, or threads.
metrics.notes: Needs unified summary-generated event across product surfaces.

metrics.label: Coaching Gained
metrics.definition: Count of coaching insights delivered and acknowledged by managers or reps.
metrics.notes: Needs clear metric model for generated versus acted-on coaching.

metrics.label: Close % Increase
metrics.definition: Relative increase in close rate for AskElephant-assisted cohorts versus baseline or control.
metrics.notes: Requires cohorting and attribution model; avoid showing as exact without confidence.

metrics.label: Churn % Reduced
metrics.definition: Relative reduction in churn risk or realized churn for assisted cohorts.
metrics.notes: Requires account-level outcome linkage and confidence framework.

metrics.label: Total Revenue Generated
metrics.definition: Revenue created or influenced by AskElephant-assisted deal motion.
metrics.notes: Requires explicit attribution model and confidence scoring.

metrics.label: Deals Closed with AskElephant
metrics.definition: Count of closed-won deals with qualifying AskElephant involvement during opportunity lifecycle.
metrics.notes: Requires opportunity-level linkage between AskElephant actions and close outcome.

metrics.label: Chats Generated
metrics.definition: Count of chat responses generated by AskElephant across supported chat surfaces.
metrics.notes: Needs canonical merge for all chat endpoints.

metrics.label: Questions Asked
metrics.definition: Count of user questions asked to AskElephant chat and assistant surfaces.
metrics.notes: Needs canonical question-submitted event definition.

metrics.label: Most Common Question Asked
metrics.definition: Top recurring normalized user question over selected time range.
metrics.notes: Requires semantic clustering and deduplication pipeline.

metrics.label: Most Common Objection Received
metrics.definition: Top recurring objection theme detected across meetings, chats, and communication channels.
metrics.notes: Requires objection classification pipeline with confidence model.

metrics.label: Most Common Customer Quote
metrics.definition: Most frequently cited customer quote cluster over selected time range.
metrics.notes: Requires quote extraction and canonical clustering.
